docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBOZA, SANTIAGO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CHANGE DEFENDANT'S NAME FROM EVELINA VASQUEZ **TO** EVELINA MARQUEZ. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBOZA, SANTIAGO
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR AMENDED CLAIM HEARING SET FOR OCT-05-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED SEP-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, EVELINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDAN. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PRESENT AND INTERPRETS FOR BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARBOZA, SANTIAGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, EVELINA $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $680.00, THE COURT AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO CONFORM TO PROOF. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR RENT THROUGH AND INCLUDING THE WEEK OF SEPTEMBER 27, 2010. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY BARBOZA, SANTIAGO AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, EVELINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY BARBOZA, SANTIAGO AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, EVELINA
